positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a soaring majestic owl perched on a crescent moon branch, surrounded by bioluminescent, stylized floral elements and delicate constellation lines. The style is neo-art nouveau combined with modern geometric graphic design. Use high contrast black and white with strategic pops of deep sapphire blue and soft gold accents. Composition should be highly symmetrical, focusing on a strong central silhouette. Clean lines, bold shapes, and negative space are essential. Vector art aesthetic, suitable for screen printing on apparel, perfect for dark fabric.
negative: blurry, photographic, realistic, text, watermark, logo, copyright, multiple characters, messy, grain, artifact, low detail, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs
